{{CargoRelic
|name=Misfortune Star
|class_id=20141
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=The dark-blue diamond is extraordinarily beautiful and glorious, dazzling in a fierce glow! It carries, however, so many amazing but tragic stories. It always brings dramatic misfortune to its owner!
|fame=15
|art=29
|fth=16
|civ=15
|tech=15
|ss1=Per 5 Jinx Points, Snail ATK +3<br>Per 5 Jinx Points, Snail RUSH +3<br>Jinx Points: 50/50
|ss2=Per 5 Jinx Points, Snail ATK +6<br>Per 5 Jinx Points, Snail RUSH +6<br>Jinx Points: 50/50
|ss3=Per 5 Jinx Points, Snail ATK +9<br>Per 5 Jinx Points, Snail RUSH +9<br>Jinx Points: 50/50
|ss4=Per 5 Jinx Points, Snail ATK +9<br>Per 5 Jinx Points, Snail RUSH +9<br>Jinx Points: 50/50
|ss7=Per 5 Jinx Points, Snail ATK +9<br>Per 5 Jinx Points, Snail RUSH +9<br>Jinx Points: 50/50<br> (Awakened)
}}
